'''Gray Wing''' was the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who flew as a subordinate of [[Gray Leader/Legends|Gray Leader]]<ref name="AGTTSWU" /> [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Horton Salm/Legends|Horton Salm]] with [[Gray Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gray Squadron]],<ref name="CCGCS" /> one of the four main Rebel battle formations participating in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. "Gray Wing" was among the earliest [[Death/Legends|fatalities]] of the historic battle.<ref name="AGTTSWU" />

==Behind the scenes==
The [[1983]] [[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (novelization)|novelization]] of {{Film|VI}} uses the term "Wing" to refer to both [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] units and individual pilots. While the novel mentions a "Gray Wing", it is unclear if this is a reference to this pilot or their group.<ref name="ROTJn">[[Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (novelization)|''Star Wars'' Episode VI: ''Return of the Jedi'' novelization]]</ref>
